summary: Frontend-only testing of Iteration 16 One-Click Calibration pipeline. All 11 functional invariants verified end-to-end through the real preview URL. Pipeline auto-starts, sweeps 16 PHY channels (~30s), shows phase banner progression (sweep → matching → snapshotting → done), renders Calibration Summary card with correct values (swept=16, matched=0 safety-correct, snapshot name starts with 'One-Click', CSV filename matches /^one-click-calibration-.+\.csv$/), fires CSV download event, persists snapshot to localStorage dsp_snapshots_v1, disables ac-close during matching/snapshotting (re-enables at done). Regression: Auto-Capture flow still produces (0) disabled Apply Match; pn-type-pink/white/sweep, meters-popout, open-snapshot all render. One safety bug found in read-only mode.

ui_bugs.issue: Read-only safety violation: pipeline does NOT halt in read-only mode. Expected phase to remain 'sweep' with no progress, but the pipeline advances all the way to 'done' — a snapshot IS saved to localStorage and a CSV download IS triggered in read-only mode (observed: ocSummary {swept:0, matched:0, snapshot:'One-Click 6/26/2026, 4:30:54 PM', csv:'one-click-calibration-...csv'}). The ac-error 'App is in read-only mode — unlock first.' DOES appear (correct), but the pipeline doesn't actually stop. Root cause: in AutoCaptureSequence.jsx line 84, `start()` early-returns `undefined` when readOnly is true, so in runOneClickPipeline() line 238 the check `if (sweepRes?.cancelled)` is falsy (undefined) and the pipeline continues to matching → snapshotting → done. Fix: when readOnly, return `{cancelled: true, count: 0}` from start(), OR change orchestrator guard to `if (!sweepRes || sweepRes.cancelled)`.

action_items: Fix read-only safety violation in AutoCaptureSequence.jsx: when `readOnly` is true, `start()` should return `{cancelled: true, count: 0}` (currently returns undefined) so `runOneClickPipeline()` halts at the 'sweep' phase. As written, a locked app still writes a snapshot to localStorage and triggers a CSV download — which contradicts the safety-first design of read-only mode.
critical_code_review_comments: AutoCaptureSequence.jsx line 83-85: `start()` returns `undefined` on readOnly early-return; orchestrator depends on `sweepRes?.cancelled` which is therefore falsy — pipeline does not halt. Return `{cancelled: true, count: 0}` or strengthen orchestrator guard.

AutoCaptureSequence.jsx line 262: `downloadCsv(csvName, results.length ? results : [])` — when results is empty (readOnly scenario) it still writes a CSV with only the header row and fires the download. Consider skipping CSV when swept===0.
AutoCaptureSequence.jsx 615 lines — getting close to the 700-line guideline; consider extracting `runOneClickPipeline` + CSV helpers into a separate hooks/util module on next iteration.

ocPhase is not reset across re-mounts; relies on the modal unmounting. Fine for current flow but startedOneClickRef coupling means if the user closes-and-reopens One-Click in the same session, it WILL re-fire (because component unmounts each time) — this is correct behaviour, just noting the design depends on full unmount.
seed_data_creation: Cleared dsp_snapshots_v1 localStorage between runs to avoid stale entries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 One-Click Calibration: 10/11 review-request invariants pass on first try. The single failing invariant is the read-only test — pipeline does not stop at 'sweep' phase because start() returns undefined on readOnly early-return, while orchestrator only checks sweepRes?.cancelled. Verified via real preview URL https://code-fixer-248.preview.emergentagent.com. Captured phase progression: idle → sweep → snapshotting → done (matching transitions in <500ms so was occasionally missed by 500ms polling — not a bug, just timing). ac-close correctly disabled during snapshotting and re-enabled at done. CSV download fired exactly once per pipeline run. localStorage entry confirmed. Regression of open-auto-capture and top-bar pn-type-* buttons all OK.
rca of the issue:
Bug: read-only pipeline does not halt.
Repro: 1) Open app, navigate to Meters. 2) Toggle TopBar from EDITABLE → LOCKED. 3) Click open-one-click. 4) Wait 3s.
Observed: oc-phase-id shows 'phase: done', ocSummary renders with swept=0/matched=0 but snapshot+CSV created. The ac-error correctly shows 'App is in read-only mode — unlock first.'
Expected (per review request): phase remains 'sweep' with no progress; no snapshot saved; no CSV downloaded.
Root cause: AutoCaptureSequence.jsx:83-85 — `if (readOnly) { setError(...); return; }` returns undefined. In runOneClickPipeline line 237-238, `const sweepRes = await start(); if (sweepRes?.cancelled) return;` — undefined?.cancelled === undefined (falsy) so the early-exit is skipped and the pipeline proceeds through matching → snapshotting → done unconditionally.
Mitigation (one-line fix): change line 84 to `if (readOnly) { setError('App is in read-only mode — unlock first.'); setRunning(false); return { cancelled: true, count: 0 }; }`. Alternatively strengthen orchestrator: `if (!sweepRes || sweepRes.cancelled || sweepRes.count === 0) { setOcPhase('cancelled'); return; }`.
